info.title: API Colombia
info.description: Open and free API that contains general information about Colombia

get.description: This endpoint returns the Airports in colombia including general info like name, description, images, etc...

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: It can be sorted by any of the fields that have numerical, string, or date values (for example: Id, name, description, etc.).

parameters.name: sortDirection
parameters.description: Possible values: 'asc' or 'desc'.

get.description: This endpoint returns the information for the airports with the provided id
This endpoint returns the information for the airport with the provided name
This endpoint returns a list of  Airports any of the following fields(Name, Description, city) match the provided keyword
This endpoint returns a list of Airports using pagination including page, pagesize, total records and data, example api/v1/airport/pagedList?page=1&pagesize=10
